name: sevacare-elder-care-system
description: Elder Care Management System - Full Stack Application

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd oldagehome-backend && npm install && cd ../oldagehome-frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w oldagehome-backend" "npm run dev -w oldagehome-frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w oldagehome-backend && npm run build -w oldagehome-frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w oldagehome-backend && npm run lint -w oldagehome-frontend
